claim: Product team feedback from customer problems should inform model training direction, not just research team decisions—product and research should collaborate upstream
actionable: Establish channels where your product team's customer feedback directly shapes model post-training priorities alongside research team decisions.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Use vibe checks with specific creative artifacts (Virtual Boy game, PowerPoint presentations, Excel files) to evaluate model capability evolution across training snapshots
actionable: Create a repeatable creative artifact test (e.g., generate a specific game, presentation, or spreadsheet) to run on every model checkpoint to track capability improvements visually.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Models need improved visual perception to understand UI design at the pixel level (padding, margins, alignment) beyond just semantic code understanding
actionable: When using models for UI generation, supplement with screenshot feedback loops using browser automation (Playwright MCP) to validate pixel-level design correctness.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Models can prototype UI changes in artifacts faster than hand-coding, enabling non-engineers to explore design permutations without implementation
actionable: Use Claude to generate UI prototypes in artifacts mode and iterate with designers before engineering implementation to accelerate design exploration.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Build flexibility to support both MCP (API-driven) and browser automation interfaces because some legacy systems will never expose APIs
actionable: Architect agent systems to handle both structured APIs via MCP and unstructured UI automation via Playwright/browser tools for legacy system compatibility.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Benchmark scores don't always correlate with user perception of improvement—focus on customer feedback to determine if a model is genuinely better
actionable: Supplement benchmark metrics with user research and customer feedback to validate that performance improvements translate to real-world utility.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Interactive planning with user feedback loops is more valuable than autonomous execution hours—users need to validate plans before agents run long tasks
actionable: Design agentic systems to show execution plans and request approval before long-running tasks execute, rather than optimizing for autonomous duration.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Knowledge work (document analysis, research) shows similar exponential improvement as coding but is time-shifted—expect non-coding agentic workflows to mature later
actionable: Invest in agentic systems for knowledge work knowing they will improve rapidly, but expect them to lag coding agents by 6-12 months in maturity.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Rename the Claude Code SDK to Claude Agent SDK because it's a general-purpose agent framework, not just for coding
actionable: When referring to Claude Code SDK documentation, use 'Claude Agent SDK' to understand its broader applicability beyond coding tasks.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic

claim: Anthropic's platform strategy centers on composable building blocks (same harness used in training, cloud code, cloud AI, and customer products) that work together
actionable: Build your agent infrastructure using composable modules so they can be reused across cloud code, cloud AI, and custom products.
source_title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Anthropic's roadmap for Agents and Developers — Mike Krieger, Anthropic
